The Friday Note — Issue #7

The New Middlemen

March 27, 2026 • The Future of PMM

Welcome

This week I've been thinking about middlemen.

Not the old kind — the distributors, the resellers, the channel partners. The new kind. The ones that showed up this week all at once, without asking.

Google AI Mode crossed 75 million daily active users. Meta embedded Manus into Ads Manager for 4 million+ advertisers. OpenAI rolled ChatGPT ads to every free user. And the biggest: OpenAI and Amazon announced a $50B strategic partnership.

Three platforms. Same week. Same move: inserting an AI layer between your product and your buyer.

—Chris

🔥 Deep Dive

The Full-Stack Buyer: From ERP to AI Checkout

For 20 years, the buyer's journey had a clean separation: marketing owned awareness, sales owned the deal, and the ERP handled fulfillment. These systems talked through humans.

That separation is collapsing.

🏗️ The New Commerce Stack

Agents Are Connecting the Full Stack

🧠 AI Discovery — ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity
↕ UCP (Universal Commerce Protocol)
🛒 Agentic Checkout — "Buy it in ChatGPT"
↕ MCP / A2A (Agent Protocols)
📦 Commerce Cloud — Shopify, Salesforce, SAP
↕ Native ERP Integration
🏭 ERP Backend — SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics

Read the Full Analysis →

From the top: Shopify and Google co-developed UCP — letting AI agents browse catalogs and complete checkout. Walmart, Target, Wayfair, Etsy on board.

From the bottom: SAP announced MCP servers for Commerce Cloud. Oracle has 1,000+ AI agents across Fusion. Microsoft's Dynamics 365 Commerce MCP Server is live.

The bridge: OpenAI + Amazon's $50B deal creates persistent-memory agents that execute multi-step commerce workflows.

📊 Chart of the Week

The Agentic Commerce Explosion

Consumers Using AI in Their Buying Journey

2023
 
 ~8%
2024
 
 ~15%
Jan 2026
 
 45%
2030 (est.)
 
 ~50% via agents

Sources: IBM, Morgan Stanley, PYMNTS

📰 News Roundup

What Happened This Week

OpenAI

ChatGPT ads expand to all free and Go users →

Retail dominates early inventory. Truist: <$1B this year → $30B by 2030.

Meta

Manus AI live in Ads Manager for 4M+ advertisers →

$2B acquisition → 7-week integration. Fastest ever.

Shopify + Google

Universal Commerce Protocol gains momentum →

Walmart, Target, Wayfair, Etsy on board. Agentic checkout coming to Gemini.

Gartner

AI skills mandatory for marketers by 2027 →

Predicts $58B productivity shift. +1,200% spike in our trend tracking.
